evaluation.summary: The 1‑D EBM shows no sensitivity to boundary conditions, yielding identical albedo, heat transfer, and ice outcomes across all tests, providing no new insight.
next_directions: Develop more complex cloud feedback schemes that could produce boundary‑dependent behavior.
Extend the analysis to multi‑dimensional EBMs to capture spatial heterogeneity and feedback interactions.
Conduct systematic uncertainty quantification to resolve NaN parameter estimates and validate statistical significance.
